user.title: WAREMA WMS WebControl
user.description: Enter the address of your local WebControl box. The box must be reachable directly (e.g. http://webcontrol.local or http://10.1.5.17).

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the WebControl box at this address.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This WebControl box is already configured.

init.title: WAREMA WMS WebControl options
init.description: Presets: one per line as "Name | payload_hex". Device class overrides: one per line as "channel name = awning" (optional).

error.invalid_preset: Each preset line must be "Name | payload_hex" with an even-length hex payload.
